stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. You are flying VFR in a light aircraft and are about to cross the river Donau from the North in a Southernly direction. The visibility is reduced due to fog. Which point should you use to determine your position?

options.a: EDMV Aerodrome because the runway areas are large and easy to identify
options.b: The lighted tower with 1965ft elevation because it is lit
options.c: The factory between Osterhofen and Vilshofen as the river sharply bends through the middle
